tasks.title: Project scaffold: Xcode project + four local Swift Packages + test targets
acceptance_criteria: Empty app target builds under Swift 6 strict concurrency
All four local packages added to the app target exactly once
Each package's Package.swift declares both a library target and a matching test target
TrestleUITests XCUITest target is scaffolded, empty, and building against the app scheme
NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription and NSBonjourServices (["_trestle-host._tcp"]) present in Info.plist
CI lint script exists and fails the build on Dictionary/Set usage outside the named Keychain/Core-Data exceptions

tasks.title: Core value types (Card, RoomCode, SeatState, SessionPhase, RoundState, etc.)
acceptance_criteria: All types Codable/Sendable/Equatable per tech_specs interfaces-json
RoomCode failable init excludes 0/O/1/I/L and normalizes case
Unit tests cover RoomCode validation edge cases

tasks.title: Command payload contract (16 CommandPayload cases + rejection enums + SignedCommand)
acceptance_criteria: Every one of the 16 CommandPayload cases has a fully field-defined struct matching tech_specs interfaces-json exactly
Round-trip Codable tests pass for every payload type
SeatClaimRejectionReason/DraftRejectionReason/MoveRejectionReason/SessionContinuationReason stay four separate enums, never merged

tasks.title: GameSession reducer + RoundState mutation boundary guard
acceptance_criteria: apply(_:) is the sole place phase/seats/currentRound mutate; a boundary test fails if anything else constructs or mutates RoundState
rebuild(from:) is the single code path used identically for cold launch, live tail-append, and reconnect-from-cursor, proven by a test that exercises all three call sites

tasks.title: GameRules pure engine (legality, trick resolution, scoring)
acceptance_criteria: Zero I/O, fully deterministic
Discard-down draft, lead rotation, and moveRejectedIllegal vs moveRejectedStaleTrick are proven via unit tests against fabricated command sequences
A deliberately reordered/duplicated command array replays to the identical terminal RoundState as the canonical ordering

tasks.title: HostPassEntitlement data model (fields-only)
acceptance_criteria: Compiles with isActive defaulting to false
No UI or paywall reference anywhere in this task

tasks.title: Command signing + Keychain key storage
acceptance_criteria: Curve25519 sign/verify round-trip test passes
Signing key loads-or-creates via Keychain only; grep check confirms no UserDefaults/plist key storage anywhere in the package

tasks.title: Command log persistence (append-only signed JSON-lines)
acceptance_criteria: Flat newline-delimited JSON per session in Application Support, FileHandle+fsync on every append
Append validates monotonic sequence and signature
loadAll stops at the first invalid/corrupt line and never crashes, proven with a deliberately truncated fixture file

tasks.title: Wire protocol and client request types
acceptance_criteria: NetworkTransport protocol compiles with no assumed transport
JoinRequest/SeatClaimRequest shape is documented inline as the frozen App-Clip-adapter seam — no field changes without flagging it in this task list first

tasks.title: Simulated transport (in-memory, injectable reordering)
acceptance_criteria: makeConnectedPair(peerCount:) supports up to 12 peers
Supports injecting reordered, duplicated, and delayed message delivery for reducer tests

tasks.title: Live MultipeerConnectivity transport
acceptance_criteria: Host is the sole MCNearbyServiceAdvertiser/Browser; joiners never advertise or browse and cannot discover each other
MCSession encryption is .required
discoveryInfo carries only appVersion/protocolVersion/serviceNonce
Bonjour service type in code matches the exact string pinned in Info.plist

tasks.title: Heartbeat monitor
acceptance_criteria: Fixed constants: 2s interval, atRisk at 3 missed (~6s), disconnected at 5 missed (~10s)
A simulated timeline test proves statusStream emits the correct transitions at those exact thresholds

tasks.title: HostGameEngine (host-only authoritative command author)
acceptance_criteria: Concurrent SeatClaimRequests for the same seat resolve deterministically via actor mailbox order; every loser gets seatClaimRejected(.alreadyTaken)
Discard-down draft and both move-rejection paths proven against SimulatedTransport with reordered/duplicated commands
Two-round auto-continuation (roundStarted auto-issued after roundEnded, dealerIndex rotates, cumulativeScoresBySeat actually changes) proven end-to-end via SimulatedTransport

tasks.title: Session metadata retention store
acceptance_criteria: Core Data-backed retention sweep at 30 days OR 100 rounds, whichever is smaller
clearAll wipes only the metadata index; a test asserts the raw log files on disk are untouched after clearAll
Never reads from or writes to CommandLogFileStore's .jsonl files owned by T-011

tasks.title: HostPass StoreKit2 scaffolding
acceptance_criteria: Local .storekit config drives StoreKitTest coverage for purchase/restore/default-locked
currentEntitlement() resolves async and never blocks app launch
A test simulates slow entitlement resolution and confirms the free game loop behaves identically either way

tasks.title: M1 connectivity probe harness + written finding
acceptance_criteria: Bare API-level host + 11+ joiners, MCSession only, no game logic, sustained 5 minutes, repeatable

Run as a dedicated calendared session with a stated minimum headcount; if 10-12 can't be sustained, the actual achieved ceiling is recorded as a dated, explicit finding in the doc, never a silent scope-down

tasks.title: App shell, routing, LoadState, splash/resume
acceptance_criteria: One NavigationStack per role; host and joiner roots never mix mid-session
Splash resolves within a sub-second budget in a preview harness to either createRoom/enterCode or a rebuilt GameSession from a cached log
This is the second of exactly three tasks allowed to touch TrestleApp/App.swift (scaffold, this, and T-034); no other task edits it

tasks.title: Shared UI components + preview fixtures
acceptance_criteria: CardView is the single renderer for hand and trick-in-progress cards across all CardVisualState cases; no second card renderer exists
isHost gates chrome only through HostChromeOverlay; no inline isHost conditional anywhere else in PrimaryUI

HostChromeOverlay accepts an optional injected accessory-chrome ViewBuilder slot so host-only chrome authored in PolishResilience can be composed in later without PrimaryUI ever importing PolishResilience
PreviewFixtures supplies hand-authored fake GameSession/SeatState data so PrimaryUI never needs to import Services

tasks.title: Host track screens
acceptance_criteria: Loading/empty/success/error states present, with permission-denied and lost-host-session shown as two distinct error states
Start Game stays disabled with an explicit inline reason until a stable 10-12 seated count is reached
HostLobbyView consumes HostChromeOverlay's injected chrome slot for the host-only status strip rather than importing PolishResilience directly

tasks.title: Joiner track screens
acceptance_criteria: Room-not-found and room-full render as distinct error states driving distinct next actions
A race-lost seat tap flashes an inline 'just taken' label anchored to that exact seat cell

tasks.title: Draft and Trick Table screens
acceptance_criteria: Draft is tap-one-to-discard with a count-only 'N of 12 confirmed' progress line, no card passing
Trick table uses seat-relative GeometryReader+trig placement with your seat always bottom-center; legal cards full opacity, illegal 0.45 opacity plus fixed desaturation
Legal/illegal opacity is computed by calling DataDomain's GameRules.legalPlays directly as a client-side preview — never a separately reimplemented legality check
Cosmetic pending-tap state clears the instant its command resolves, regardless of outcome, with zero backing state change

tasks.title: Round Transition and Match End screens
acceptance_criteria: Match End is one screen with two zones: cumulative score as hero content, the 'one-round-pair session in v1' banner as a smaller strip below
A defensive fallback renders instead of crashing on an incomplete-score input

tasks.title: Recovery overlay and rejection toast
acceptance_criteria: One shared overlay layer renders both the at-risk banner and the hard disconnected-decision scrim
Host sees a continue/skip/abort action sheet; joiners see a passive waiting card
moveRejectedIllegal and moveRejectedStaleTrick render genuinely distinct copy and tone, never collapsed to one message
This package never imports PrimaryUI's screen types, only DataDomain's event/reason enums

tasks.title: Host status strip + battery/thermal reliability
acceptance_criteria: Green/yellow/red battery tiers; red forces an explicit 'continue with risk' confirmation
Idle-lock is disabled for the session duration and restored on exit, verified in a real 60+ minute device session with a written pass/fail record in docs/test-protocols/

tasks.title: Haptics
acceptance_criteria: turnStart/trickWon/invalidPlay each fire via CoreHaptics
turnStart fires exactly once per turn transition, non-repeating, proven by a call-count test against a scripted transition sequence

tasks.title: Accessibility audit pass
acceptance_criteria: performAccessibilityAudit() passes on lobby, draft, trick-table, and match-end screens
Combined VoiceOver phrase (card identity + legality + turn state) present on trick-table and draft elements
Focus order follows seat/play order for trick history, then moves to the player's own hand, not raster order

tasks.title: Live wiring integration + chrome composition (M4 checkpoint)
acceptance_criteria: LiveMultipeerTransport, HostGameEngine, and GameSession are wired end-to-end in the real app

RecoveryOverlayView, RejectionToastView, and HostStatusStripView from PolishResilience are composed into the app shell here — via HostChromeOverlay's injected slot and a root-level overlay modifier — the only place PrimaryUI and PolishResilience are wired together
This is the third and final task allowed to touch TrestleApp/App.swift
A 3-device live smoke test with one deliberately throttled/backgrounded peer passes and is recorded

tasks.title: Two-round match proof (M7)
acceptance_criteria: roundIndex and dealerIndex are observed to actually change between round 1 and round 2 in a real test run
A client disconnecting between round 1's score post and round 2's redeal reconnects and replays to the identical state every other peer reaches

tasks.title: Physical-device production-readiness gauntlet (M8)
acceptance_criteria: Five separately recorded protocols: three consecutive clean 10-12-player games, host-kill-mid-round recovery, disconnect-mid-draft recovery, packet-reordering replay check, two-room isolation under simultaneous churn
Each protocol has its own dated pass/fail record; a single successful run does not satisfy this
